title: Named Tags - Unique Name Tags Textures
description: A resource pack that gives a better, special textures to name tags when renamed with Minecraft’s hidden easter eggs
body:
# Named Tags

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/c5ikwM95/images/398eaa0e360c2e23adae999312f148e12c0cb39a.gif)

Named Tags brings Minecraft’s hidden easter egg name tags to life with unique textures in a clean vanilla style

By default, name tags look now blank, but once renamed they show their classic text style unless they match one of the secrets below :

- `jeb_` → Rainbow sheep
- `Dinnerbone` / `Grumm` → Upside-down mobs
- `Toast` → Special rabbit texture
- `Johnny` → Hostile vindicator

No dependencies are required in **Minecraft 1.21.5+**!


## Compatibility

| Minecraft Version | Dependency |
|-------------------|------------|
| 1.21.5 → 1.21.8           | ✅ None required |
| 1.21 → 1.21.8   | [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) |

## Installation

1. Download the pack for your version of Minecraft
2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder
